description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better bag for a Catalan fan than this authentic FC Barcelona bag. Neatly designed with lots of organiser space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to school or college. Height: 45 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 16 cmCapacity: 25 litresMade of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaningBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with pouches and a zippered mesh compartmentOne front utility compartment with swoosh logo on itFCB badge on the frontSynthetic haul loop for handling ease with the font "tots units fem forca" - FCB's mottoWide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
